text.title: elicitation-techniques Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for elicitation-techniques as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Leading questions in interview guides ("isn't it true that X?", "don't you find Y difficult?").
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Leading questions produce confirmation bias; lint guides for "don't you", "wouldn't", "isn't it true" before sending to a stakeholder.

failure-mode.description: Workshop agenda filled with talk slots; fewer than 40% hands-on activities.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Agents skew to presentation slots; the loudest voice dominates and real requirements stay tacit.

failure-mode.description: Document analysis citing a regulation version that has since been superseded.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Outdated regulatory requirements invalidate downstream artifacts silently; record doc_version + retrieval_date on every source.

failure-mode.description: Single-row table fixation: agent reads the selection table and returns one technique, never a mix.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Force the prompt to return a mix with an explicit triangulation pair; reject any output with only one technique.

failure-mode.description: Default-to-interview bias when inputs are sparse.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Require explicit stakeholder_count and goal fields; return an error if either is null rather than defaulting to interview.

failure-mode.description: Agent proposes "ask the user how they do X" instead of "watch the user do X" when goal is discover_current_state.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: When goal == discover_current_state, force at least one observation slot in the output.

failure-mode.description: Brainstorming convergence skipped — agent returns 30 ideas without ranking.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Mandate a converge prompt (brainstorm review pass) before the brainstorming output is accepted.

failure-mode.description: Survey question type imbalance — agent over-uses Likert scale.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Mix multiple-choice + ranking + 1 open question per section; validate against a known-good template.

failure-mode.description: The README lists only 8 techniques when BABOK v3 names 10 elicitation techniques.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Teams using only the common 8 miss interface analysis and collaborative games. These techniques address system boundaries and creative convergence — skipping them produces integration-requirement gaps.

failure-mode.description: The selection table appears one-to-one; real situations need a combination.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Real situations require paired techniques where the second challenges the first. Agents tend to pick a single row and stop, missing triangulation.

failure-mode.description: Selector returns a default (interview) regardless of context when inputs are sparse.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Selection rule depends on hidden variables: stakeholder count, geographic distribution, sensitivity, pre-existing artifacts, time budget, regulatory regime. Without those inputs the selector fails.

failure-mode.description: Focus groups treated as a neutral technique when they have statistical biases.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Focus-group consensus is biased toward extroverts and toward agreeing with the facilitator. Treat output as hypotheses, not requirements.

failure-mode.description: Brainstorming alone produces volume, not quality.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Always pair with a convergence step (brainstorm does this; vanilla brainstorming does not).

failure-mode.description: Document analysis on regulations/standards loses validity fast.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The regulation version cited may be superseded. Selector must record doc_version and retrieval_date.

failure-mode.description: Prototyping treated inconsistently across BABOK sections.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: BABOK counts prototyping in both elicitation and requirements-analysis-and-design. Without a clear scope flag agents double-count it.

failure-mode.description: Leading questions in guides: "don't you", "wouldn't", "isn't it true".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Prep agents bias toward confirmation. Lint guides before sending to a stakeholder.

failure-mode.description: Document-analysis hallucination: agents cite "the spec says X" without a path and line range.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Require `path:line-line` citation; reject claims without it.

failure-mode.description: Observation translated to interview: agents propose "ask the user" instead of "watch the user".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: When goal == discover_current_state, force at least one observation slot.

failure-mode.description: Collaborative-game selection: agents pick the most-mentioned game (Product Box) regardless of fit.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Provide a small lookup {goal: [games]} and constrain selection.

failure-mode.description: Scope creep into business-analyst variant: agents invent PII pipelines and consent forms.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Keep ba-core narrow — selection plus fundamentals — and route execution-heavy concerns to the sibling business-analyst skill.
